title: Flow Chart
description: The Flow Chart component provides an interactive way to create, edit and visualize flow diagrams with nodes and connections. It includes a renderer for displaying the chart and a creator panel for adding new nodes.

types.title: AXFlowChartComponent
types.description: Main component for creating and managing flow charts

props.name: initialFlowChartNode
props.description: Initial nodes to be displayed in the flow chart

props.name: initialFlowChartEdge
props.description: Initial edges to be displayed in the flow chart

methods.content:
/**
 * Draws edges on the flow chart.
 *
 * @param edges Array of edges to draw.
 * @returns void
 */
drawEdges(edges: AXFlowChartEdges[]): void

/**
 * Removes a specific edge from the flow chart.
 *
 * @param edge The edge object to remove.
 * @returns void
 */
removeEdge(edge: AXFlowChartEdges): void

/**
 * Creates one or more nodes on the flow chart.
 *
 * @param nodes Array of node definitions to create.
 * @returns void
 */
createNode(nodes: { id: string; type: string; label: string; x: number; y: number }[]): void

/**
 * Removes a node by its identifier.
 *
 * @param nodeId The unique id of the node to remove.
 * @returns void
 */
removeNode(nodeId: string): void
